---
title: "Biostatistics"
subtitle: "Regression, splines, missing data, Bayesian workflows"
description: |
  Lessons covering core biostatistical methods for clinical research,
  including live in-browser tutorials powered by WebR — drag sliders,
  edit models, no R installation required.
categories: [active]
listing:
  contents: ["*.qmd"]
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, subtitle, description, categories, reading-time]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

A growing collection of lessons on regression methods, missing data,
longitudinal modelling, survival analysis, and Bayesian workflows.
Most were originally written for medical and PhD audiences at FMUP.

The interactive lessons run R directly in your browser — there is no server,
no account, and nothing to install. Click through, drag sliders, edit code,
and break models freely.
